meta.description: Machine-readable promotion policy governing how episode families move between statuses. G002 requires every family to have explicit promotion_criteria; this surface defines the allowed statuses, required criteria, and invariants that tests enforce.
meta.honesty_note: This policy describes what the repo enforces today. It does not describe aspirational future gates. See docs/promotion-gate-contracts.md for the full gate-level contracts (D002/D003/D004).

benchmark_ready.description: Family has complete packets, rubrics, provenance, and all promotion_criteria satisfied. May appear in a public benchmark pack.
benchmark_ready.promotion_criteria_requirement: All base criteria must be true.

blocked_pending_rewrite.description: Family is repo-visible or has unmet criteria. Must NOT appear in any public benchmark pack until rewritten.
blocked_pending_rewrite.promotion_criteria_requirement: At least one criterion must be false. blocked_reason and rewrite_requirements must be present.

local_only.description: Bucket/family exists only in local gitignored paths. Zero committed families.
local_only.promotion_criteria_requirement: Not applicable — no committed families to evaluate.

source_is_public_curriculum.description: Family derives only from student-visible public curriculum, not teacher-only material.

no_teacher_only_inputs.description: No teacher-only prompt text, rubric content, or holdout material was used to author the family.

rubric_template_exists.description: A complete public rubric template with normalized weights exists for this family.

not_repo_visible_holdout.description: Family framing has not been disclosed in the public repo. Repo-visible holdouts cannot honestly claim sealed status.

fresh_non_disclosed_wording.description: New wording authored specifically for teacher-only use, not already disclosed publicly.

stored_outside_public_pack.description: Teacher-only content stored in gitignored paths, not in any tracked benchmark pack.

invariants.rule: Every family in any family registry must have an explicit promotion_criteria object. Zero families may lack this field.
Benchmark-ready families must have all four base promotion criteria set to true.
Blocked families must have at least one promotion criterion that is false, making the block machine-readable.
A family with a blocked_reason (repo-visible disclosure) must NOT have status benchmark_ready.
Every blocked family must document rewrite_requirements before it can be considered for promotion.
All included families in a benchmark pack must share the pack's declared role_scope. Mixed-role packs without explicit scoping are forbidden.
Episode IDs must not overlap across packs targeting different roles.
Every tracked source-intake record must appear in exactly one intake bucket with explicit status and promotion_mode.
Every intake bucket must use a documented source_intake_status_vocabulary value and a documented promotion_mode.
Manual-curation-only and blocked teacher-only intake seams must not carry promoted public families or public-pack refs.

promoted.description: At least one RF-authored family has been promoted from source intake into a public benchmark pack.

curated.description: Source is reviewed and suitable, but no RF-authored family is promoted yet.

discovered.description: Source is identified only. It may require curation or manual rewrite before any family can exist.

blocked_teacher_only_holdout.description: Source is visible only as a teacher-only holdout direction and must never appear in student-visible packs or curriculum.

public_benchmark_family.description: Source has already yielded an RF-authored family in a student-visible public benchmark pack.

public_candidate.description: Source may yield a future public family, but only after authored episodes, rubric coverage, and provenance are checked in.

manual_curation_only.description: Source may inform future episodes only through manual teacher rewrite. Bulk import and direct promotion are blocked.

teacher_only_manual_curation.description: Teacher-only holdout direction. Any future episodes must stay outside public packs and student-visible curriculum.
